nodes.name: Blue-fronted blue flycatcher
nodes.summary: Blue-fronted blue flycatcher（Eumyias hoevelli）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Blue-fronted blue flycatcher。

nodes.name: Blue-fronted blue flycatcher
nodes.summary: The blue-fronted blue flycatcher (Eumyias hoevelli), also known as the blue-fronted flycatcher, is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References

nodes.name: Eumyias
nodes.summary: Eumyias（Eumyias）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Matinan blue flycatcher、Blue-fronted blue flycatcher、Timor blue flycatcher等11种鸟类。
